'''Kalibac Industries (KI)''' was a small, cutting-edge [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturing firm based on the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. A former member of the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]], the firm never found much popularity on the galactic droid market. And several legal battles with its competitor, [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] had left Kalibac on a very weakened state by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Their droid models, however, were superior to norm and were often copied by [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw techs]] to produce faulty and cheap imitations.

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The logo of Kalibac Industries shown in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" /> uses the letters "K" and I" of the [[Geonosian (writing system)/Legends|Geonosian alphabet]] developed by [[Philip Metschan]] for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="Geonosian">{{WebCite|url=http://www.metschanmedia.com/philip_metschan//portfolio.htm|text=Star Wars Typefaces|work=Philip Metschan's portfolio|nobackup=1}}</ref>
